coreJobStatement: Operate and maintain a client's built environment to achieve continuous safety compliance, operational readiness, and regulatory conformance while minimising client-side labour

l6Systems.name: Facility Assessment & Contract Scoping
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assess client site conditions and define service scope and SLA obligations

l6Systems.name: Facility Onboarding & System Setup
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deploy monitoring infrastructure and configure service management platforms at client sites

l6Systems.name: Planned Preventive Maintenance
l6Systems.jobFamily: Execute scheduled maintenance tasks to preserve equipment integrity and prevent regulatory non-compliance

l6Systems.name: Corrective Maintenance & Repair
l6Systems.jobFamily: Respond to and remediate unplanned failures, incidents, and work orders

l6Systems.name: Safety & Regulatory Compliance Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Inspect, test, document, and certify compliance with fire safety, health, and environmental regulations across client sites

l6Systems.name: Service Reporting & Client Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Report service performance, close work orders, and deliver compliance documentation and SLA evidence to clients

vnUnits.name: Site Survey & Audit Tools
vnUnits.functionalJob: Measure, document, and assess client site physical conditions including floor plans, asset inventory, and infrastructure state during contract scoping

alternatives.name: Digital laser measurement + floor-plan software (Bluebeam, AutoCAD)
alternatives.source: Analyst estimates, IFM provider service descriptions

alternatives.name: Manual tape measure + paper plans
alternatives.source: Field observation

alternatives.name: BIM-based digital twin survey (Matterport, NavVis)
alternatives.source: Emerging adoption; no published split

vnUnits.name: Contract & CAFM Onboarding Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Configure service-level agreements, import asset registers, and provision client access to the FM management platform at contract start

alternatives.name: Integrated IWMS/CAFM (IBM Tririga, Planon, MRI)
alternatives.source: Mordor Intelligence FM Software Market 2025

alternatives.name: Spreadsheet-based (Excel)
alternatives.source: FM industry observation

vnUnits.name: Building Management System (BMS/BAS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Monitor and control HVAC, lighting, and building utilities through a centralized automation platform to maintain operational conditions at client sites

alternatives.name: Wired BAS (BACnet / KNX / Modbus — Siemens, Honeywell, Johnson Controls)
alternatives.source: MarketsandMarkets FM market report; Mordor Intelligence BMS

alternatives.name: Cloud-connected smart BMS (IP-based, open API)
alternatives.source: FM market reports 2025

vnUnits.name: IoT Sensor Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Deploy wireless sensors across client buildings to collect real-time data on environmental conditions, equipment status, and occupancy for remote monitoring

alternatives.name: LoRaWAN sensors (LPWAN, long range, low power)
alternatives.source: IoT Analytics, building IoT market estimates

alternatives.name: BLE/Zigbee mesh sensors (short range, dense deployment)
868 MHz / proprietary RF (EasyWave, EnOcean)
alternatives.source: No published FM-sector split

vnUnits.name: CMMS (Computerised Maintenance Management System)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Schedule, assign, and track preventive maintenance work orders across client sites to ensure equipment uptime and regulatory compliance

alternatives.name: Cloud/SaaS CMMS (IBM Maximo, ServiceMax, MaintainX, Fiix)
alternatives.source: Grand View Research FM Software Market 2025; CMMS segment 32% share per Mordor

alternatives.name: On-premise CMMS (Infor EAM, Oracle Maintenance Cloud)

vnUnits.name: Mechanical Inspection & Test Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Measure and diagnose the operating condition of building mechanical and electrical systems during scheduled inspections

alternatives.name: Handheld digital test instruments (multimeter, thermal camera, vibration analyser)
alternatives.source: Field observation; no published market split

vnUnits.name: Mobile Field Service Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Receive, dispatch, and manage corrective maintenance work orders on mobile devices enabling technicians to document repairs on-site in real time

alternatives.name: CMMS mobile app (integrated, same vendor as L6c CMMS)
alternatives.source: Estimated from CMMS market adoption

vnUnits.name: Spare Parts & Asset Store
vnUnits.functionalJob: Store, track, and replenish spare parts and consumables needed for corrective maintenance across the service portfolio

alternatives.name: Centralised FM depot (van stock + warehouse)
alternatives.source: No published split

vnUnits.name: Door & Exit Monitoring System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Monitor emergency exit door status, detect unauthorized openings, and report alarm events to ensure fire safety compliance across client buildings

alternatives.name: Hardwired electronic alarm systems (door contacts wired to fire panel)
alternatives.source: No published FM-sector split; inferred from fire safety product market

alternatives.name: Battery-powered wireless alarm devices (EasyWave, LoRaWAN door sensors)
alternatives.source: Growing segment per FM IoT adoption data

alternatives.name: Mechanical-only door alarms (no monitoring, no wireless)
alternatives.source: Declining; legacy installed base

vnUnits.name: Fire Safety Inspection Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Plan, execute, and document fire safety inspections including detector tests, extinguisher checks, and emergency lighting verification across client sites

alternatives.name: Digital CAFM-integrated inspection platform (Planon, Planninq)
alternatives.source: No published split

alternatives.name: Standalone mobile inspection app (iAuditor/SafetyCulture, Protex AI)
Paper-based inspection logs
alternatives.source: Declining; compliance pressure reducing paper use

vnUnits.name: Emergency Lighting Test System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Automatically or manually test emergency luminaires at regulatory intervals and record pass/fail results for compliance documentation

alternatives.name: Automated self-test emergency luminaires (BS EN 62034)
alternatives.source: Industry standard; widely adopted in EU post-2015

vnUnits.name: FM Analytics & Reporting Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Aggregate service performance data into KPI dashboards and SLA compliance reports for client delivery and management review

alternatives.name: Embedded analytics in IWMS/CAFM
alternatives.source: CAFM market estimated at $1.26B in 2025 (Future Market Insights)

alternatives.name: Standalone BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

vnUnits.name: Compliance Documentation Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Store, manage, and deliver inspection certificates, audit trails, and regulatory compliance documentation to clients and authorities

alternatives.name: Paper archive
alternatives.source: Declining under GDPR and audit requirements
